regions.name: North Plains
regions.summary: Seasonal plains with hot summers, a monsoon period and cool winters.

regions.name: Himalayan and Hill
regions.summary: Cooler hill climates with shorter warm seasons and altitude-sensitive timing.

regions.name: Western Arid
regions.summary: Hot, dry and semi-arid areas where shade and careful watering often matter.

regions.name: Central Plateau
regions.summary: Warm inland conditions with strong summer heat and a distinct monsoon.

regions.name: Eastern Humid
regions.summary: Warm, humid areas with generous monsoon rainfall and mild cool seasons.

regions.name: Southern Tropical
regions.summary: Mostly warm growing conditions with regional monsoon and summer-heat differences.

regions.name: Coastal
regions.summary: Humid maritime conditions with mild winters, salt exposure and heavy seasonal rain.
